Uses of Class
com.adrewdev.functional.Maybe

  • Uses of Maybe in com.adrewdev.functional

    Methods in com.adrewdev.functional that return Maybe
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <U> Maybe<U>
    Maybe.bind(Function<T,Maybe<U>> binder)
    Transforms the contained value using the given function that returns a Maybe.
    Maybe<E>
    Result.compact()
    Converts a Result<Unit, E> to a Maybe for error handling.
    static <T> Maybe<T>
    Maybe.empty()
    Returns a Maybe representing the absence of a value.
    Maybe<T>
    Maybe.ensure(Predicate<T> predicate)
    Returns this Maybe if it contains a value and the predicate matches, otherwise returns None.
    static <T> Maybe<T>
    Maybe.from(T value)
    Creates a Maybe from a potentially null value.
    <U> Maybe<U>
    Maybe.map(Function<T,U> mapper)
    Transforms the contained value using the given function if present.
    static <T> Maybe<T>
    Maybe.none()
    Returns a Maybe representing the absence of a value.
    Maybe<T>
    Maybe.or(Maybe<T> other)
    Returns this Maybe if it contains a value, otherwise returns the given Maybe.
    Maybe<T>
    Maybe.or(Supplier<T> valueSupplier)
    Returns this Maybe if it contains a value, otherwise returns a Maybe containing the value supplied by the given supplier.
    Maybe<T>
    Maybe.or(T value)
    Returns this Maybe if it contains a value, otherwise returns a Maybe containing the given value.
    Maybe<T>
    Maybe.orElse(Maybe<T> other)
    Returns this Maybe if it contains a value, otherwise returns the given Maybe.
    static <T> Maybe<T>
    Maybe.some(T value)
    Creates a Maybe containing the given non-null value.
    Maybe<T>
    Maybe.tap(Consumer<T> consumer)
    Executes the given consumer with the contained value if present.
    Maybe<T>
    MaybeAsync.toMaybe()
    Converts to Maybe (blocking).
    static <T> Maybe<T>
    Maybe.tryFirst(List<T> list)
    Returns a Maybe containing the first element of the list, or None if the list is null or empty.
    static <T> Maybe<T>
    Maybe.tryLast(List<T> list)
    Returns a Maybe containing the last element of the list, or None if the list is null or empty.
    Maybe<T>
    Maybe.where(Predicate<T> predicate)
    Returns this Maybe if it contains a value and the predicate matches, otherwise returns None.

    Description

    MaybeAsync.toCompletableFuture()
    Returns the underlying CompletableFuture.
